title: SINT Delegation Request
description: Body for POST /v1/tokens/delegate. Delegates a parent capability token to a new subject with attenuated (strictly narrower) authority. Depth is bounded at 10; attenuation is enforced by delegateCapabilityToken in @pshkv/gate-capability-tokens.

parentTokenId.description: UUID v7 of the parent token being delegated from. Must already exist in the token store.

request.description: The new token request derived from the parent. Authority fields (resource, actions, constraints, expiresAt) must be strictly narrower than the parent's.

privateKey.description: Ed25519 private key (hex-encoded, 64 chars) of the parent token's subject. Used to sign the delegated token.

issuer.description: Ed25519 public key of the delegating party (must equal parent.subject).

subject.description: Ed25519 public key of the new token holder.

resource.description: Resource URI. Must equal or be a sub-path of parent.resource.

actions.description: Actions granted. Must be a subset of parent.actions.

constraints.description: Physical constraints. Each field must be tighter than or equal to parent.constraints (monotonic narrowing).

parentTokenId.description: Parent token UUID v7. Must equal top-level parentTokenId.

depth.description: Delegation depth. Root tokens have depth 0; each delegation increments by 1. Max 10.

attenuated.description: Must be true for any non-root delegated token.

revocable.description: Whether the token can be revoked via POST /v1/tokens/revoke.
